Welcome to onboarding
This assistant guides you step by step through your legal setup. You can pause at any time and continue later.
Self-employed

This model is for experienced self-employed escorts who want to manage their work independently. You keep full control over your prices, availability and which bookings you accept. Payouts are handled via Secure Payment on Gingr. You remain responsible for taxes, insurance and your social protection.
Included

✔ Secure Payment on Gingr including cancellation protection
✔ Clear platform rules and a safer booking environment
✔ Privacy-friendly setup with a public nickname and verified identity in the background
✔ Document storage for confirmations, proofs and statements in one place
✔ Built for independent work
You remain responsible for

✔ AHV/AVS registration or confirmation of self-employment or a solid proof package
✔ Your taxes
✔ Your insurance, especially accident and health insurance
✔ Your pension and retirement planning
Who is this for?

Best for escorts who already work independently and have their activity professionally organized — for example across multiple channels or clients, with an existing structure and the necessary proof of self-employment.
Availability

✅ Swiss citizens: Yes, if you live in Switzerland
✅ EU/EFTA citizens: Yes, but only if you live in Switzerland, can work here legally and have a clear Swiss connection plus supporting proof
❌ Non-EU/EFTA citizens: Not available
❌ EU/EFTA citizens without an existing self-employed structure or without sufficient proof: Not available
Employed — up to 90 days
Short-term employment for EU/EFTA citizens without a Swiss residence permit. Full protection for the duration.
Included

✔ Secure Payment + cancellation protection
✔ Payroll via QUITT.ch
✔ Legal protection for 90 days
✔ Clear rules and safer bookings
Important limitation
This model is limited to a maximum of 90 days. After that, a permit or a model change is required.
Employed (unlimited)

This is the simplest and safest solution. You are legally protected, fully insured and receive your salary every month directly to your bank account — based on your own prices. You can end this employment relationship at any time without commitments, set your own prices and freely decide when and how much you want to work.
Included

✔ Full accident insurance (NBU)
✔ Social insurance (AHV/ALV/IV/EO)
✔ Pension fund (BVG), if you meet the requirements
✔ G-IT AG (Gingr) is your employer
✔ Payroll and contract handling via QUITT.ch
✔ Secure and guaranteed payouts
✔ No own company required
✔ Legal in all Swiss cantons
Who is this for?
Ideal for most escorts who want a safe, legal and simple solution without paperwork.
Choose work model
Your choice determines which legal documents you sign and how your payouts are processed.
Not sure which one fits?
For 90% of escorts, the employed model is the easier and safer choice. Choose self-employed only if you already operate as an independent business and can provide proof.
Your data is safe
Your address and personal details are stored encrypted and are never shown publicly — not on your profile and not to customers.
Why do we need the address?
The address is needed for your employment contract and payroll. It is not shown publicly.
What is a nationality gate?
Your citizenship determines which work models are available to you.
Why the residence permit?
We need to confirm your residence status to make your setup legal. The document is not shown publicly.
What happens after upload?
We manually review your document within 24 hours. You can continue the wizard immediately — we confirm it in the background.
Which documents are accepted?
PDF, JPG or PNG. All corners visible, text readable, not expired. Permits B, C and L.
Why is this important?
Required for Secure Payment, not publicly visible, confirmation within 24h, and if there is an issue you will know exactly what is missing.
Your available options
Based on your verified details, we show you exactly which models are available to you.
What does 'pending review' mean?
If your permit is still being reviewed, you can still continue. Activation remains pending until confirmation.
Can I change the model later?
Yes, you can change your work model later. Please contact support.
Earnings calculator
Enter your hourly price and see how your net salary is built up — including social insurance and platform fee.
How is my salary calculated?

Customer price
- Employee social security & pension contributions (10.98%)
- Platform + employer costs (15%)
= Gross salary (before withholding tax)
What is the QUITT fee?
CHF 50/month for payroll administration and compliance. It is deducted from your monthly payout salary.
Withholding tax — default

Swiss citizens & Permit C → withholding tax = no (editable)
Permit B/L & 90-day model → withholding tax = yes (editable)
Withholding tax
This information helps us estimate your payout correctly. The final rate is confirmed by QUITT before payroll.
What is withholding tax?
Withholding tax is deducted directly from your salary before you receive it. It applies to people without a Permit C or Swiss citizenship.
What influences the rate?
Canton, marital status, living situation with partner, number of children. Each canton has its own rates.
Saved & encrypted
All information is stored encrypted and is never shown on your profile.
Employment contract
Contract — up to 90 days
Review your details and sign your employment contract. After signing, Secure Payment is activated.
What happens after signing?
Your contract is stored. Secure Payment and booking protection are activated (for pending documents after review).
QUITT fee — CHF 50/month
This fee covers payroll administration and compliance setup. It is deducted from your monthly payout.
Can I cancel the contract?
Yes, you can cancel at any time — no negative consequences. Valid according to the notice period in the contract.
Self-employed setup
We need a few details and proof. You can continue immediately after upload — we review within 24 hours.
Which proofs are accepted?

Option A (freelancer): external profile links (at least 1) + AHV/AVS confirmation (recommended)
Option B (company): commercial register extract + UID number
What is false self-employment?
Authorities assess the status based on actual behavior, not just on a contract. That is why we need proof that you truly work independently.
What is the AHV/AVS confirmation?
The official confirmation from the compensation office that you are registered as self-employed. If you do not have it yet, you can still continue.
Self-employed agreement
Sign your agreement and confirm that you work independently.
Why do we need this confirmation?
To avoid the risk of false self-employment, we must document that you truly work independently and are not treated like an employee.
What happens after signing?
Your uploads are reviewed within 24 hours. Secure Payment is activated after confirmation.
Almost done!
Your onboarding is complete. Here is what happens next.
What is unlocked now?

✔ Secure Payment + cancellation protection
✔ Structured booking flow
✔ Social protection (employed) or document vault (self-employed)
Where can I find my documents?
Under 'Documents' in your dashboard you will find your contract and all legal files.
Help & info
All your data is stored securely. You can pause at any time and continue later.
